title: lithocarpus tenuinervis
intro: Lithocarpus tenuinervis, also known as the Narrow-leaved Bur oak, is a species of evergreen tree native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. The leaves of this plant contain bioactive compounds that exhibit medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which can be used to treat various health conditions. Lithocarpus tenuinervis is valued for its potential health benefits, including the ability to reduce fever, relieve coughs and sore throats, and support the immune system. In herbal medicine, the leaves of Lithocarpus tenuinervis are typically prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, or used in combination with other herbs in traditional remedies.
